title: acrostichum simplex var. martinicense
intro: Acrostichum simplex var. martinicense, also known as the Martinique leather fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce infections. The plant is also said to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels and improving cardiovascular health, due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. In herbal preparations, Acrostichum simplex var. martinicense is often used as a decoction, made by steeping the leaves in hot water, to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
